extension.news: v. 1.0.7 "10th Anniversary Release" - 2026-03-06 - **50 New Sites**: PornDoe, PornOne, PornHat, PornTrex, CumLouder, PornMZ, AnySex, PornDig, Tube8, xCafe, LetMeJerk, Upornia, FullPorner, XXXFiles, 3Movs, PornHD3X, XMoviesForYou, Porn300, OK.xxx, PerfectGirls, SuperPorn, XBabe, Veporn, Porn7, Porn00, Tubev, HClips, ThePornBang, BravoPorn, PornSlash, Pornheed, HDZog, ZBPorn, TrendyPorn, Nudez, Pornwhite, Pornflip, PornTry, BananaMovies, SaintPorn, WatchPorn, BigAssPorn, FPO, TheyAreHuge, BigTitsLust, BlackPorn24, MilfPorn8, MaturePorn.Tube, Blowjobs.pro, LesbianPorn8. - **Improved and Fixed**: Ashemaletube, Hanime, Vikiporn, Spankbang, Rule34video, Pornhub, Redtube, PornHits, PerfectGirls, SuperPorn. - **Hanime**: Reworked playback for the current nhplayer flow, added updated challenge/PoW handling and improved playback fallback for Android/Fire TV. - **PerfectGirls**: Fixed pagination and stabilized playback. - **SuperPorn**: Added Select Content (Straight/Gay) and improved playback behavior. - **View Handling**: Improved persistent Wall/List view behavior across pagination and when returning from playback. - **Core Engine & Networking**: Smart WebP caching, parallel preloading, Native PoW Bypass for Hanime, Local Proxy Controller.
